1869680.name: Adam's Memories
1869680.description:
Adam's Memories is an action-adventure/walking simulator game about life at school, the struggle of living, and the unfairness of life.

The story is told by Adam since most of the scenes are fragments of his memories. The story will focus on the life of Elena a high school student.

In the game, you will discover the story through dialog. The game doesn't contain battles except for bosses and there are six bosses.
The game will have an inventory and some simple puzzles.

The game aims to be 5-6 hours long.

Feature list:
  • Hand-drawn map and characters
  • Colorful and touching characters
  • Minimalist soundtrack
  • Epic boss battles
  • Interesting and mysterious story
1869680.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
